specific_question: What was the average delivery time for Elexion Automotive vehicles ordered online in Q2 2025?
answer: The sales and marketing department in 2025 reported that vehicles ordered through the Elexion Automotive platform in Q2 2025 had an average delivery time of 27 days.
dr_question: How could Elexion Automotive utilize Automotive Cloud's dealer performance management tools by early 2027 to strengthen relationships with its North American dealer network and, at the same time, maintain 90% of its direct-to-government sales channel?
